summary_en: 11,000,000 shares (1.84% of shares outstanding) up to ¥2,600M maximum. Execution window May 15, 2026 to May 14, 2027. Method: open-market purchase via discretionary investment agreement (立会取引市場における市場買付け).
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of treasury stock based on articles of incorporation pursuant to Article 165, Paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: RIZAP Group resolved on May 14, 2026 to acquire up to 11,000,000 treasury shares (1.84% of outstanding shares) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥2,600,000,000. The acquisition window runs from May 15, 2026 to May 14, 2027, using open-market purchases via discretionary investment agreement (立会取引市場における市場買付け). The company states it will conduct the buyback as chocoZAP transitions from a profitability phase to a re-growth phase, aiming to optimize capital efficiency alongside continued investment. Management believes current share price reflects a discount to the company's future growth potential and that opportunistic repurchase will enhance medium-to-long-term enterprise value and return on equity.
